justification: All 4 files created with correct paths and purposes listed. All 8 ACs explicitly mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage with test names. renewSubscription confirmed to use exactly 2_592_000_000 ms in multiple places. Error codes match spec exactly (SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND, SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_CANCELLED, CANNOT_RENEW_CANCELLED). 18 tests covering all 8 ACs including edge cases (AC5 already-cancelled, AC7 renew-cancelled). files_changed lists all 4 files with purpose. No deviations or escalations reported.

observations.text: All 8 ACs mapped with specific test names and counts — no gaps in coverage
18 tests is well above the minimum needed for 8 ACs, indicating thorough edge-case coverage
Exact 2_592_000_000 ms constant confirmed multiple times in output
AC5 (already-cancelled) and AC7 (renew-cancelled) state transition edge cases explicitly tested — these are common failure modes
AC4 description says 'cancellationDate' rather than 'cancelledAt' — potential field naming deviation from the spec's expected 'cancelledAt' field, though actual code not visible to confirm
Constructor injection of SubscriptionRepository implied by 'delegates all persistence to the repository' and mock-based testing approach
Zero deviations and zero escalations with high-confidence justification
